task: My name is Mike. I want to send my friend Christene (christenson@gmail.com) a Dillard's “Merry Christmas” eGift Card worth $100 for next Christmas, with the message “Merry Christmas, wish you many more years to come.” Add it to my cart.
final_result_response:
I completed all form fields on the Dillard's eGift Card page (https://www.dillards.com/p/dillards-egift-card/503516586) with the following details:

- **Type of Card:** "Merry Christmas" is a seasonal design NOT currently available in the dropdown (only offered during the holiday season). The closest available option was selected.
- **Amount:** $100.00
- **Recipient's Name:** Christene
- **Send-to Email:** christenson@gmail.com
- **Confirm Send-to Email:** christenson@gmail.com
- **Send Date:** 12/25/2026 (next Christmas)
- **Your Name:** Mike
- **Personal Comments:** "Merry Christmas, wish you many more years to come."

Unfortunately, clicking "Add To Bag" repeatedly returned a server-side error: *"There was an error adding this item to your bag. Please try again later."* This is a persistent issue on Dillard's end — their `OrderItemAdd` endpoint is not processing the eGift card successfully at this time. The "Merry Christmas" card design is also unavailable outside of the holiday season. Please try again closer to Christmas when the seasonal design becomes available and the server issue may be resolved, or contact Dillard's customer service for assistance.

judge.reasoning:
**Task Understanding:** The user (Mike) wants to add a Dillard's "Merry Christmas" eGift Card worth $100 to the cart, addressed to Christene at christenson@gmail.com, with a send date of next Christmas (12/25/2026) and the message "Merry Christmas, wish you many more years to come." Successful completion requires the item actually being added to the cart with all the specified details.

**Output Assessment:** The agent navigated to the Dillard's eGift card page, filled in all form fields correctly (amount: $100, recipient: Christene, email: christenson@gmail.com, send date: 12/25/2026, sender: Mike, message: "Merry Christmas, wish you many more years to come."). However, two critical failures occurred: (1) The "Merry Christmas" seasonal card design was not available in the dropdown — only non-seasonal designs like "Dillard's - Navy" and "Dillard's - Red" were present, so a different design was selected. (2) Every attempt to click "Add To Bag" returned a server-side error: "There was an error adding this item to your bag. Please try again later." The cart count remained at 0 throughout all attempts.

**Evidence:** Step 49 confirms a pink error banner appeared after clicking "Add To Bag" and cart count shows (0). Step 62 confirms the same error persisted on subsequent attempts. Step 64 shows 4 failed network requests to the OrderItemAdd endpoint. Step 66 (subagent) also confirmed failure with cart count remaining at 0. Step 55 confirms form fields were validly populated. The execution_integrity_status is "degraded" due to the error at step 5 failing to select "Merry Christmas." The "Merry Christmas" design was confirmed unavailable in all dropdown evaluations (steps 6, 7, 14, 21).

**Summary:** The task required adding the item to the cart, which never succeeded — all "Add To Bag" attempts returned a server error with cart count staying at 0. Additionally, the requested "Merry Christmas" card design was unavailable (seasonal only), so a different design was substituted.
